## Description

Brief description of the changes.

## Changes

- [ ] Contract changes
- [ ] Test changes
- [ ] Documentation changes

## Testing

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`forge test`)
- [ ] New tests added for changed functionality
- [ ] Gas snapshot updated (`forge snapshot`)

## Security Considerations

- [ ] No new centralization risks introduced
- [ ] No storage layout changes (if upgrading)
- [ ] No new external calls to untrusted contracts
- [ ] Checked for reentrancy, overflow, access control issues
